title: India Records Lowest-Ever Price for Green Hydrogen in Tender
content: India has recorded its lowest-ever bid for green hydrogen supply, with a price of ₹279 per kilogram ($3.08/kg) in a tender to supply 10,000 tonnes per year to Numaligarh Refinery Ltd. in Assam. Nine bidders participated and the result was called a historic milestone in India's clean energy journey.
author: Analysts Account
